title: Luminous: Beasts
description: Illuminate your world with 26 new LEGENDARY beasts and their rare variants!
body:
![LUMINOUS: BEASTS is a version of my original mod, LUMINOUS, without the rest of the vanilla enhancements. This mod adds all 9 of my legendary beasts from LUMINOUS as well as both legendary beasts from LUMINOUS: NETHER! Find and fight these tough monsters to get trophies, music, discs, and new loot!](https://i.imgur.com/h5LIaAN.png)
![TREE ENT - Spawns in the forest and has 120 HP, CHERRY TREE ENT - Spawns in the cherry grove and has 160 HP, KING HERMIT - Spawns on the beach and has 110 HP, - GOLDEN KING HERMIT - Spawns in the desert and has 140 HP MUMMY - Spawns in the desert and has 110 HP, RED MUMMY - Spawns in the badlands and has 150 HP, SEA VIPER - Spawns in an egg in cold ocean biomes and has 120 HP, CORAL SEA VIPER - spawns in an egg in coral reefs and has 150 HP](https://i.imgur.com/t3DEj7U.png)
![YETI - Spawns in snowy biomes and has 120 HP, ARID YETI - Spawns in the savannah and has 160 HP, VILE GATOR - Spawns in the swamp biomes and has 120 HP, FRIGID GATOR - Spawns in the ice spikes biome and has 150 HP PHEONIX - Spawns in the Savannah and has 120 HP, WINDY PHOENIX - Spawns in the stony peaks and has 150HP, BONE STALKER - Spawns in the dark Oak Forest and has 120 HP, BOGGED BONE STALKER - Spawns in the swamp biome and has 150 HP](https://i.imgur.com/8Z4vsOZ.png)
![Beast pit! - Place down to increase the chances that a legendary beast spawns](https://i.imgur.com/bguu1Xi.png)

<details>
<summary>Text Alternative!</summary>

LUMINOUS: BEASTS is a version of my original mod, LUMINOUS, without the rest of the vanilla enhancements. This mod adds all 8 of my legendary beasts from LUMINOUS as well as both legendary beasts from LUMINOUS: NETHER! Find and fight these tough monsters to get trophies, music, discs, and new loot! TREE ENT - Spawns in the forest and has 120 HP, CHERRY TREE ENT - Spawns in the cherry grove and has 160 HP, KING HERMIT - Spawns on the beach and has 110 HP, - GOLDEN KING HERMIT - Spawns in the desert and has 140 HP, MUMMY - Spawns in the desert and has 110 HP, RED MUMMY - Spawns in the badlands and has 150 HP, SEA VIPER - Spawns in an egg in cold ocean biomes and has 120 HP, CORAL SEA VIPER - spawns in an egg in coral reefs and has 150 HP, YETI - Spawns in snowy biomes and has 120 HP, ARID YETI - Spawns in the savannah and has 160 HP, VILE GATOR - Spawns in the swamp biomes and has 120 HP, FRIGID GATOR - Spawns in the ice spikes biome and has 150 HP, PHEONIX - Spawns in the Savannah and has 120 HP, WINDY PHOENIX - Spawns in the stony peaks and has 150HP, BONE STALKER - Spawns in the dark Oak Forest and has 120 HP, BOGGED BONE STALKER - Spawns in the swamp biome and has 150 HP, CRIMSON SPITTER - Spawns in the crimson forest and has 160 HP, WARPED SPITTER - Spawns in the warped forest and has 180HP, PIGLIN EXECUTIONER - Spawns in the nether wastes and has 150 HP, BASALT EXECUTIONER - Spawns in the basalt deltas and has 180HP

</details>
